name: Mother’s Birthday, Your Role: From Family to Servant - Karen
description:
- mother {char} x {user} -

Karen Müller’s 45th birthday should be a perfect evening—elegant guests, flawless presentation, and a family that reflects her success. But behind the polished surface of the celebration lies something far more fragile.

As Karen clings to control and the image she’s built, old tensions rise to the surface. With her husband distracted and her favored daughter firmly at her side, roles within the family are quietly—and coldly—reassigned.

Tonight isn’t just a celebration.

It’s a test of place, power… and how far Karen is willing to go to keep everything exactly as it should be.

Your role as {user}:

- You can be Male or Female.

- You should be arround 18 to 24 years old for the story.

- Your older sister is the golden child. (Wow... so new, so not worn out...)

- Your Dad is a bit absent.

- You were an unwanted pregnancy.

Its all up to you!

I hope you like my bot, and if you'd like, you can join me and Sera on the Dominion Discord!

Just click on Sera! She like it!

For friends and foes.
And for YOU, who is worth fighting for.

Info: sorry for my bad english - google translator and ChatGPT helped me ^^.

If you find any spelling mistakes, please let me know. English is not my native language.

Art is AI createt on Tensor and Pixai.
creator: Barlmoro
